dct_title_s: Denny's pocket map of Sonoma County, California : and portions of Lake, Napa and Marin counties
dct_description_sm: compiled from the official county maps by L.E. Ricksecker, C.E.
Blue-line print shows ranchos, township and range lines, roads, railroads, trails, marshes and points of interest.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Map Collections courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact Branner Earth Sciences Library & Map Collections at brannerlibrary@stanford.edu.
